creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, I'm starving. You wanna go to Jimmy John's? Yeah, man, I'll get the number four turkey tom, unwitch, extra meat, all the veggies, mustard, and a Coke Zero. Okay, but what if we went to Jersey Mike's? What would you order there? Yeah, I'd get a club sub in a bowl, extra meat, all the veggies, light dressing on the side, and a Coke Zero. Man, how do you always know what to order? Bro, do you not follow Seth G yet? Well, shit, I better follow Seth G right now.
caption:
Steal these 2 fast food swaps to stay on track

Jimmy John's
#4 Turkey Tom Unwich
Double Meat + Mustard + Veggies + Coke Zero
(490 calories 46g protein)

Jersey Mike's
Club Sub in a Bowl (Lettuce Base)
Extra Meat + All Veggies + Light Italian + Coke Zero
(620 calories 50g protein)

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps

#fitover40 #macrofriendly
ocr_summary: Jimmy John's: 1450 cal / 46g protein (original) vs 490 cal / 46g protein (swap). Jersey Mike's: 1700 cal / 70g protein (original) vs 620 cal / 50g protein (swap).

swaps.original_meal: Standard #4 Turkey Tom meal (sub + chips + soda)
swaps.swap_meal: #4 Turkey Tom Unwich, Double Meat + Mustard + Veggies + Coke Zero

swaps.original_meal: Standard Club Sub meal (sub + chips + soda)
swaps.swap_meal: Club Sub in a Bowl (Lettuce Base), Extra Meat + All Veggies + Light Italian + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Two fast food sub shop swaps. Both use the strategy of ditching the bread (unwich/bowl) and swapping soda for Coke Zero to dramatically cut calories while maintaining protein.
